Impact_Business_Technical: Parity ambiguity can invalidate confidence in staging/live alignment and promotion decisions
Evidence_Pointers: docs/evidence/environment_endpoints.json; .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml; runtime probe evidence for staging/frontend hosts
Root_Cause: Canonical environment endpoint evidence and runtime-resolvable host contract are not fully aligned
Containment: Treat parity as blocking for promotion decisions until probe contract is green
Fix_Bounded: Add endpoint parity gate (DNS/TLS/HTTP) for API and frontend canonical hosts in CI/deploy proof
Tests_Validation: Fail on unresolved/invalid canonical hostnames and schema-mismatch evidence
